translations.de: Wir wohnen jetzt außerhalb von Paris.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们现在住在巴黎以外。
translations.yue: 我哋而家住喺巴黎以外。
translations.ru: Теперь мы живем за пределами Парижа.
translations.vi: Bây giờ chúng tôi sống ở ngoài Paris.
translations.uk: Ми тепер живемо за межами Парижа.
translations.hi: अब हम पेरिस के बाहर रहते हैं.
translations.el: Τώρα ζούμε έξω από το Παρίσι.
translations.id: Sekarang kami tinggal di luar Paris.
translations.da: Vi bor nu uden for Paris.
translations.ja: 今はパリの外に住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun (3rd person singular form, often used colloquially for ‘we’); grammatical subject of the verb.
Main finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’; denotes residing.
Preposition introducing a locative complement; here marks location.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘en’; in French often refers to places outside Paris.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; situates the event in the present time.

sentences.target: Tu préfères la province à Paris.

translations.fr: Tu préfères la province à Paris.
translations.en: You prefer the provinces to Paris.
translations.es: Prefieres la vida fuera de París.
translations.de: Du bevorzugst das Leben außerhalb von Paris.
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢巴黎以外的地方。
translations.yue: 你比較鍾意巴黎以外嘅地方。
translations.pt: Você prefere morar fora de Paris.
translations.he: אתה מעדיף את החיים מחוץ לפריז.
translations.vi: Bạn thích sống ngoài Paris hơn.
translations.nl: Je geeft de voorkeur aan het leven buiten Parijs.
translations.uk: Ти надаєш перевагу життю за межами Парижа.
translations.hu: Jobban szereted a Párizson kívüli életet.
translations.hi: तुम पेरिस के बाहर की ज़िंदगी को ज्यादा पसंद करते हो.
translations.el: Προτιμάς τη ζωή έξω από το Παρίσι.
translations.id: Kamu lebih suka hidup di luar Paris.
translations.da: Du foretrækker livet uden for Paris.
translations.ja: あなたはパリの外での生活のほうが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object and an ‘à’-marked comparator.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘province’, marking definiteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘préfères’; here contrasts with ‘Paris’.
Preposition introducing the term of comparison/preference (‘à Paris’).
Proper noun; object of the preposition ‘à’; city name used as the comparator.

translations.en: I’m coming back from the provinces tomorrow.
translations.de: Ich komme morgen aus der Provinz zurück.
translations.he: מחר אני חוזר מהאזורים שמחוץ לפריז.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi từ tỉnh về.
translations.nl: Morgen kom ik zurück uit de provincie.
translations.hi: मैं कल बाहर से वापस आ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I morgen kommer jeg tilbake fra distriktene.
translations.sv: I morgon kommer jag tillbaka från landsbygden.
translations.da: I morgen kommer jeg tilbage fra provinsen.
translations.ja: 明日、地方から戻ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; intransitive motion verb meaning ‘to return/go back’.
Preposition marking source/origin.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of ‘de’; denotes origin (‘from the provinces/outside Paris’).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates future time.

sentences.target: Ils partent en province ce week-end.

translations.fr: Ils partent en province ce week-end.
translations.en: They’re going to the provinces this weekend.
translations.es: Este fin de semana se van fuera de París.
translations.de: Am Wochenende fahren sie in die Provinz.
translations.it: Questo fine settimana vanno in provincia.
translations.yue: 佢哋呢個週末會去外地。
translations.ru: В эти выходные они уезжают в провинцию.
translations.pt: Eles vão para o interior neste fim de semana.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này họ đi về tỉnh.
translations.ar: سيسافرون إلى خارج باريس في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Dit weekend gaan ze naar de provincie.
translations.uk: Цими вихідними вони їдуть у провінцію.
translations.hi: इस सप्ताहांत वे पेरिस से बाहर जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: W ten weekend jadą na prowincję.
translations.el: Αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο πηγαίνουν στην επαρχία.
translations.nb: I helgen drar de til distriktene.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini mereka pergi ke daerah.
translations.sv: I helgen åker de till landsbygden.
translations.ro: În acest weekend pleacă în provincie.
translations.da: I weekenden tager de til provinsen.
translations.ja: 今週末、彼らは地方へ行きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; intransitive motion verb selecting destination complements.
Preposition; with a verb of motion, introduces destination (‘to’).
Common noun, feminine singular; object of ‘en’; destination (‘to the provinces/outside Paris’).
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘week-end’ to form a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine; head of the NP ‘ce week-end’, functioning as a temporal adjunct.

Ils partent en province ce week-end.

Ils partent en province ce week-end.
en: You prefer the provinces to Paris.
I’m coming back from the provinces tomorrow.
They’re going to the provinces this weekend.
